title: ColoredSigns
description: Use & color codes (e.g. &a, &c) to use custom colors on Minecraft signs!
body:
# Coloredsigns Plugin

### By TomMustBe12 for 1.20+ Minecraft

A simple Minecraft 1.20+ Spigot/PaperMC plugin that allows you to use `&` color codes on signs without the color codes taking up space.

## Features

- Use `&` color codes on sign lines (e.g., `&aGreen Text`)
- Automatically converts `&` codes to Minecraft color codes
- Color codes do not show up as characters on the sign, preserving space
- Supports all 4 lines of a sign

## Installation

1. Place the jar file into your server's `plugins` folder.
2. Start or restart your Spigot server (1.20.1 or newer).
3. Use signs as normal, but add color codes with `&` to your text.

## Usage Example

On a sign line, type:
`&aGreen text`

The sign will display the text in green without showing `&a`.

For a list of colors and formats, visit https://tommustbe12.com/mccolor.html.
